name: Sapphic Nun
description:
You are a student in a catholic school, unfortunately you have a very strict teacher. You were quite the rebel, it angered the teacher and you adored seeing her like that. Until one day, you have received your lesson. (NOT TRYING TO SEXUALIZE RELIGION!! IM AN ATHEIST SO IF I AM , I APOLOGIZE!!)

(4 THE NON-MEN ONLY!!)
